todos.content: GLD_AUG_CL_EMIT — Generate executable CL model for pl330_target
todos.activeForm: Verifying executable CL exists for pl330_target
todos.detail: Cycle-level model wraps FunctionalModel; provides .drive(), .tick(), .observe(), .coverage(). CL must NEVER re-evaluate output_rules/state_updates.
todos.criteria:
<ip>/model/cycle_model.py exists
File contains zero occurrences of output_rules / state_updates / _eval_rule_expr
CycleModel API smoke test passes

todos.content: GLD_AUG_PPA_SWEEP — Drive PPA sweep through CL.tick and report measured area/power/fmax
todos.detail: Use CycleModel to produce activity vectors fed into syn / sta-post / pnr workers; capture measured PPA.
todos.criteria:
<ip>/reports/ppa_sweep.json exists with measured_area_um2, measured_power_mw, measured_fmax_mhz
Measured values within budgets defined by SSOT, or escalation noted

todos.content: GLD_AUG_SECURITY_GOALS — Add EQ_SECURITY_* goals for pl330_target
todos.detail: Each declared asset/threat should produce a security equivalence goal with stimulus + observable.
todos.criteria:
equivalence_goals.json contains at least one EQ_SECURITY_* goal
Each asset/threat from SSOT is referenced
todos.validator: python3 -c "import json; g=json.load(open('pl330_target/verify/equivalence_goals.json')); raise SystemExit(0 if any(x['goal_id'].startswith('EQ_SECURITY_') for x in g['goals']) else 1)"

todos.content: GLD_AUG_MEMORY_BOUNDARY — Drive memory boundary scoreboard via CL.observe for pl330_target
todos.detail: Observable memory state must match FunctionalModel state for read/write/byte-strobe/boundary cases.
todos.criteria:
<ip>/verify/check_memory_boundary.py exists and exits 0
Reports per-instance status

todos.content: GLD_AUG_SIGNATURE — Emit and verify model_signature.json for pl330_target
todos.detail: Signature must be fresh after every SSOT change; --check mode detects drift.
todos.criteria:
<ip>/model/model_signature.json exists
python3 emit_model_signature.py ${ip} --root . --check returns 0

todos.content: GLD_AUG_COCOTB_RUN — Run cocotb harness fl_cl_rtl end-to-end for pl330_target
todos.detail: Full DUT + FL + CL co-simulation; scoreboard compares RTL observable to FunctionalModel.apply expected.
todos.criteria:
make -C ${ip}/verify -f Makefile.sim fl_cl_rtl exits 0
Coverage report written under ${ip}/cov/

todos.content: GLD_AUG_LOOP_MAP — Emit human-vs-LLM loop_map.svg for pl330_target
todos.detail: Render <ip>/model/loop_map.mmd from authority_contract; convert to SVG.
todos.criteria: <ip>/model/loop_map.svg exists
